titles.login_digital_identity: Log in with a digital identity
titles.login_alternative_method: Log in using an alternative method
titles.havent_digital_identy: Don't have a digital identity yet?
titles.find_how_to_get_digital_id: Find out how to get it

it_wallet.name: IT-Wallet
it_wallet.learn_more_descr: IT-Wallet is the Italian digital wallet system that gives you full control over your information, without the issuing authority knowing when and how it is used.

cie.name: CIE SAML2
cie.learn_more_descr: CIE (Carta d'Identità Elettronica) is the Italian electronic identity card. Use it to access online services in a secure way via the SAML2 protocol.

cie_oidc.name: CIE OpenID Connect
cie_oidc.learn_more_descr: CIE (Carta d'Identità Elettronica) can be used with the OIDC protocol to authenticate and access online services.

spid.name: SPID
spid.learn_more_descr: SPID (Sistema Pubblico di Identità Digitale) is the Italian public digital identity system. Choose your identity provider to log in with your SPID credentials.

eidas.name: eIDAS
eidas.learn_more_descr: eIDAS (electronic IDentification, Authentication and trust Services) is the EU regulation for cross-border electronic identification. Use your national eID or notified scheme to access this service.

cns.name: CNS
cns.learn_more_descr: CNS (Carta Nazionale dei Servizi) is the identification tool that enables citizens to access public administration services online. Use it to access services that support CNS authentication.

idem.name: IDEM
idem.learn_more_descr: IDEM (Identity and Access Management for Education and Research) is the federated identity system of the Italian research and education network (GARR). Use it to access services that support IDEM authentication.

alt1.name: {Alternative 1}
alt1.learn_more_descr: {Alternative 1} is a federated identity system that allows you to access services that support {Alternative 1} authentication.
